title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
The RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Debit Card offers ultra HNI clients of the Bank a premium suite of travel and lifestyle benefits, along with enhanced convenience, robust security, and greater control over their transactions.
  * Simply wave/tap the card on the contactless Point of Sale (PoS) and pay without entering PIN for purchases upto Rs. 5000.
  * NCMC Cards will support small value offline transactions till Rs. 500.


RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Debit Card offers 3 free visits at participating Airport Lounge in India for each of the below mentioned period.   
Click here to View the Lounge List :
RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Debit Card can also be used for purchasing travel or movie tickets, paying your bills and much more.
RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Debit Cardholders will get 3 loyalty points for every 100 purchase. 
_#Loyalty point reward structure as well as reward of loyalty points for different merchant categories is subject to revision from time to time._
In addition to insurance cover for lost/stolen/Counterfeit cards, you can avail of following insurance covers:
  * Personal Accidental Insurance : Rs.10 Lakh (Accidental death & permanent disability)

_Please keep your card active to continue enjoying seamless transactions and benefits._
RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Debit Card offers a variety of exclusive benefits. 
Please refer to the services listed in the following link: [ RuPay Select Debit Card Online: Get Exclusive Offers & Benefits | RuPay](https://www.idbi.bank.in/disclaimer.aspx?lk=rupay-select)
Note: The offers are subject to change at the discretion of the network.  
*Fee depends upon SOF of Scheme code of account under which account is opened.
As RuPay Select/Opulentia NCMC Card is issued on the basis of account opening form, if you have not opted for card while opening the account and would like to avail the same, for further details.
Call on our Phone Banking numbers - Toll Free - (24x7 service)
